title: quercus engleriana
intro: Quercus engleriana, also known as the Chinese evergreen oak or Engler's oak, is a species of deciduous tree in the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Quercus engleriana is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against cancer and neurodegenerative diseases. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the tree are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to promote overall well-being and longevity.
